blocks.text: Provider runtime is an adapter boundary, not the domain system of record.

items: It does not append canonical IR events or own the task event log envelope.
It does not create or update ProviderCapability; it consumes capability data and computes local compatibility evidence.
It does not lease tasks, heartbeat assignments, write workdir config as policy, or judge validation outcomes.

blocks.text: Those responsibilities stay in contracts, scheduling, policy, and control-plane layers.
